name: How long do I have to file after forklift hit me at work in West Valley City?

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file after forklift hit me at work in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: File workers' comp ASAP (6-yr limit Utah), appeal denials in 30 days.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **In Utah, file workers' comp within 6 years but ideally within 1 year; appeals within 30 days of denial.** The statute starts from injury date or discovery.[3] Key factors: Employers must report within 7 days, but you ensure Form 122 reaches the Labor Commission promptly to avoid denials.[3] Delays risk benefit suspension. For third-party suits, 4-year negligence limit applies.[3] Act fast to preserve evidence like photos and witnesses.

description: File workers' comp ASAP (6-yr limit Utah), appeal denials in 30 days.[3]
